resources.title: NORS Complaint Codes and Definitions
resources.description: Official complaint-code reference with NORS Table 2 definitions, examples, and reporting tips.

resources.title: Your Rights as a Resident of a Long-Term Care Facility
resources.description: Connecticut Long Term Care Ombudsman resident-rights resource for residents, families, and representatives.

resources.title: Federal Resident Rights Regulation
resources.description: Federal nursing-facility resident-rights regulation, useful when the issue involves dignity, privacy, visitors, grievances, choice, or access to information.

resources.title: Freedom from Abuse, Neglect, and Exploitation
resources.description: Federal nursing-facility regulation for abuse, neglect, exploitation, reporting, investigations, and prevention policies.

resources.title: Admission, Transfer, and Discharge Rights
resources.description: Federal nursing-facility regulation covering admission, transfer, discharge, notice, bed-hold, and readmission rights.

resources.title: CMS State Operations Manual Appendix PP
resources.description: CMS interpretive guidance for nursing-facility survey requirements and F-tags.

resources.title: Connecticut LTCOP Regulations and Statutes
resources.description: Connecticut Long Term Care Ombudsman page linking state regulations and statutes relevant to Ombudsman program work.
resources.source: Connecticut Long Term Care Ombudsman Program
